subcodes.first_line: O Prince of the realm of mystic knowledge! That loving Friend, should He will to draw aside the veil from His true companions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امیر کشور عرفان آن یار مهربان اگر بید اراده پرده از رخ یاران حقیقی خویش
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
